description: Malaria (Vishama Jwara) with periodic fever and chills - malaria
Chronic cough (Kasa) with sputum production - bronchitis
Skin rash (Kustha) with redness and itching - dermatitis
Joint inflammation (Amavata) with morning stiffness - rheumatoid arthritis
Headache (Shirashoola) with nausea - migraine
Abdominal pain with indigestion (Ajeerna) - dyspepsia
High blood pressure (Raktachapa) with dizziness - hypertension
Diabetes (Madhumeha) with excessive thirst - diabetes mellitus
Anxiety (Chittodvega) with palpitations - generalized anxiety disorder
Insomnia (Anidra) with difficulty falling asleep - sleep disorder
Allergic rhinitis (Pratishyaya) with sneezing and congestion - hay fever
Eczema (Vicharchika) with dry scaly skin - atopic dermatitis
Rheumatoid arthritis (Amavata) with symmetrical joint pain - RA
Migraine (Ardhavabhedaka) with visual aura - migraine headache
Gastroesophageal reflux (Amlapitta) with heartburn - GERD
Coronary artery disease (Hridroga) with chest pain - angina
Thyroid dysfunction (Galaganda) with weight changes - hypothyroidism
Depression (Vishada) with persistent low mood - major depressive disorder
Sleep apnea (Swapna Vikara) with breathing interruptions - obstructive sleep apnea
Asthma (Tamaka Shwasa) with wheezing and breathlessness - bronchial asthma
Chickenpox (Laghu Masurika) with vesicular rash - varicella
Whooping cough (Kukkura Kasa) with paroxysmal spasms - pertussis
Urticaria (Sheetapitta) with hives - allergic reaction
Tendonitis (Kandara Shotha) with inflammation - tendon inflammation
Trigeminal neuralgia (Manya Stambha) with facial pain - nerve pain
Gastritis (Urdhvaga Amlapitta) with stomach inflammation - gastric inflammation
Varicose veins (Sira Granthi) with swollen vessels - venous insufficiency
Hypothyroidism (Galaganda) with fatigue - underactive thyroid
OCD with repetitive behaviors - obsessive compulsive disorder
Night terrors in children (Swapna Bhaya) - sleep terror disorder
Hepatitis (Yakrit Vikara) with jaundice - liver infection
Pneumonia with lung infection - respiratory infection
Psoriasis (Kitibha) with silvery scales - skin disorder
Osteoporosis (Asthi Kshaya) with bone density loss - brittle bone disease
Bell's palsy (Ardita) with facial paralysis - facial nerve disorder
Gallstones (Ashmari) with biliary colic - gallbladder stones
Myocardial infarction (Hridgraha) with chest pain - heart attack
Hyperthyroidism with weight loss - overactive thyroid
Bipolar disorder with mood episodes - manic depression
Narcolepsy with daytime sleepiness - sleep disorder
Anemia (Pandu) with fatigue and weakness - iron deficiency
Conjunctivitis (Netra Abhishyanda) with red eyes - pink eye
Otitis media (Karna Shoola) with ear pain - middle ear infection
Sinus infection (Dushta Pratishyaya) with facial pressure - sinusitis
Urinary tract infection (Mutrakrichra) with burning - UTI
Kidney stones (Vrikka Ashmari) with flank pain - renal calculi
Cirrhosis with liver scarring - liver disease
Pancreatitis (Agni Vikara) with abdominal pain - pancreatic inflammation
Appendicitis with right lower pain - appendix inflammation
Diarrhea (Atisara) with loose stools - acute gastroenteritis
